name: Lovely Brother
original_name: 我的兄弟不可能在这么萌
overview: Zhou Yu died unexpectedly, and his soul possessed the golden retriever to accompany his brother Zhu Ke! He turns into a cute dog to help Zhu Ke resist the oppression of the leaders, exposes the goddess of hypocrisy, breaks the unspoken rules of the workplace, and finally lets Zhu Ke attack - get rid of the single and become a free and happy cartoonist. However, during the tomb-sweeping, his girlfriend told Zhu Ke that he never had Zhou Yu's soul and that he had to counterattack all by himself.  (Source: WeTV)

trailers.title: 【Trailer | 预告片】Lovely Brothers |《我的兄弟不可能这么萌》: 我现在借住在芒果身体里！
